About ARC Global

WHERE ENGINEERING
MEETS MANUFACTURING

Founded in 2016 with a mission to bridge classroom education and real-world engineering, ARC Global has grown into one of India's most trusted names in prototype vehicle development, engineering consulting, and advanced mobility.

Our Vision

To become India's most respected engineering and manufacturing company, delivering innovative mobility solutions that inspire technological excellence and strengthen indigenous automotive capabilities.

Established
2016
Teams Supported
1000+
Vehicles Manufactured
250+
Years Experience
9+
Vehicle Categories
10+
Headquarters
Noida, UP
Our Mission
→ Advance engineering through practical innovation
→ Manufacture world-class mobility products
→ Empower future engineers through hands-on development
→ Drive sustainable and intelligent transportation
→ Develop indigenous engineering technologies
What We Manufacture

COMPLETE MOBILITY
SOLUTIONS

ARC Global designs, engineers, manufactures, assembles, and tests complete vehicles across multiple mobility segments—from concept to competition-ready.

🏎️
GO KARTS
High-performance go karts built for competition, research, and commercial applications with precision manufacturing from chassis to powertrain.
Racing Electric Custom Competition
🏍️
ATV & QUAD BIKES
Rugged terrain vehicles engineered for demanding environments with complete chassis, suspension, CVT integration, and differential systems.
Off-road CVT Prototype
🏁
FORMULA VEHICLES
Formula-style race vehicles for engineering institutions, motorsports teams, and research—including electric and hybrid variants.
Electric Hybrid Aero Spaceframe
⚡
ELECTRIC MOBILITY
Complete EV platform development—electric bikes, scooters, go karts, formula cars, and utility vehicles with integrated battery and BMS solutions.
EV BMS Research
☀️
SOLAR MOBILITY
Solar karts, solar utility vehicles, and hybrid solar platforms engineered for sustainable transportation and competition research.
Solar Hybrid Utility
🔧
SPECIAL PURPOSE
Customized mobility solutions for industries, research labs, defence platforms, and innovation projects—built to any specification.
Defence Autonomous Industrial
Engineering Services

END-TO-END CAPABILITY

From concept and CAD to CNC machining, welding, assembly, and validation—our multidisciplinary team handles the full development cycle.

PRODUCT ENGINEERING

Complete product development from initial concept through detailed design, analysis, and optimisation for performance and manufacturability.

  • Concept Development
  • CAD Modeling
  • CAE Analysis
  • Vehicle Packaging
  • Product Optimization
  • Technical Documentation

MECHANICAL ENGINEERING

Precision mechanical design across all vehicle systems—chassis, suspension geometry, steering, braking, and transmission.

  • Chassis Design
  • Suspension Design
  • Steering Systems
  • Braking Systems
  • Transmission Design
  • Structural Analysis

ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING

Full-spectrum electrical and electronics development for modern EVs and hybrid vehicles, from wiring harness to motor controller integration.

  • Wiring Harness
  • Battery Integration
  • BMS Development
  • Motor Controller Integration
  • Vehicle Electronics
  • Embedded Systems

MANUFACTURING

Modern fabrication, machining, welding, and assembly capabilities—producing precision-quality components and complete vehicles in-house.

  • CNC Machining
  • TIG & MIG Welding
  • Tube Bending
  • Laser Cutting
  • Fabrication
  • Precision Assembly

TESTING & VALIDATION

Rigorous testing, structural validation, and performance benchmarking to ensure every vehicle meets design and safety specifications.

  • Vehicle Testing
  • Structural Validation
  • Performance Testing
  • Technical Inspection
  • Quality Inspection
  • Documentation
Research & Innovation

FUTURE MOBILITY
TECHNOLOGIES

ARC Global continuously invests in the engineering technologies that will define the next generation of transportation.

01
Electric Vehicle Platforms
Modular EV architecture and lightweight vehicle design engineered for performance and efficiency across multiple applications.
02
Smart Mobility
Intelligent transportation solutions integrating advanced electronics, sensors, and connectivity for next-generation vehicles.
03
Autonomous Mobility
Autonomous mobility concepts and research platforms developed in-house for educational institutions and research organizations.
04
Advanced Manufacturing
Indigenous manufacturing technologies and sustainable production methods to build world-class mobility products in India.
Why ARC Global

PROVEN.
TRUSTED.
INDIGENOUS.

⚙️
Proven Experience
Nearly a decade of uninterrupted engineering and manufacturing excellence—over 1,000 teams and 250+ vehicles delivered.
🚗
Complete Vehicle Development
From initial idea to finished, tested product. We are India's only complete student motorsports engineering and manufacturing solutions company.
🏭
Advanced Manufacturing
Modern CNC machining, TIG/MIG welding, laser cutting, tube bending, fabrication, assembly, and quality validation under one roof.
👥
Engineering Expertise
An experienced multidisciplinary team covering mechanical, electrical, electronics, manufacturing, and product engineering.
🇮🇳
Indigenous Innovation
Building technologies proudly designed, engineered, and manufactured in India—strengthening the nation's automotive capabilities.
🔬
Research-First Approach
Continuous investment in EV platforms, autonomous mobility, smart transportation, and advanced manufacturing methods.
